signals.headline: Ripple Unveils Quantum-Ready Roadmap for XRPL by 2028 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple Unveils Quantum-Ready Roadmap for XRPL by 2028 | YES | HIGH confidence**
Ripple announced a detailed four-phase roadmap on April 20, 2026, to make the XRP Ledger quantum-resistant by 2028, positioning it ahead of Bitcoin and Ethereum on quantum security timelines.[1][5] Phase 3 deployment testing begins in H2 2026.[1]

signals.headline: Institutional ETF Inflows Accelerate to $65
signals.raw:
Institutional ETF Inflows Accelerate to $65.89 Million in April | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP-linked ETFs attracted nearly $56 million in a six-day positive streak, with April tracking toward the strongest monthly performance of 2026 at $65.89 million total inflows.[6] Daily inflows averaged double-digit millions, following four consecutive days of US ETF inflows totaling $38.86 million.[1]

signals.headline: SEC Schedules CLARITY Act Regulatory Roundtable (April 16) | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Schedules CLARITY Act Regulatory Roundtable (April 16) | YES | HIGH confidence**
The SEC held a roundtable on April 16, 2026, to discuss the CLARITY Act, which aims to resolve regulatory uncertainty by determining whether the SEC or CFTC will oversee digital assets.[1] This reduces long-term institutional adoption overhang.
